headline: New tomatoes day 3 in 96°F heat — run zones now.
weather_notes: Run zone 1 this morning — 3-day-old e1-e4 transplants last watered June 21 cannot go 3 days dry with 96°F today and 97°F Wednesday.
Run zone 2 this morning for w1, w4, and blackberry — last watered June 21; skip w2 and w3 garlic.
Hold Wednesday's zone runs if afternoon storms deliver — 20% storm chance that afternoon; check soil before scheduling the next run.

suggested_tasks.title: Hand-water e1-e4 transplants at stem base daily
suggested_tasks.description: 3-day-old transplants in 96-97°F heat need daily soil checks beyond the zone schedule — hand-water at the base on any day zone 1 doesn't run.

suggested_tasks.title: Finish hilling the potato bags
suggested_tasks.description: June 14 log shows two bags at 2/3 hilled and three at 1/3 — complete coverage now before plant growth outpaces stem burial in the heat.
